nodes.label: E_phys: raw real-valued input -> bounded analog voltage vector.
Xi_phys: physical noise sample-and-hold -> row/column perturbation vectors.
P_Xi: sampled row/column vectors -> temporary conductance perturbation.
F_phys: analog encoded signal interacts with slow + temporary conductance.
R_phys: analog output-target mismatch -> scalar subthreshold-like score.
C_phys: score-weighted Gilbert-style signed multiplication and slow write.
